rationale: The response immediately brakes the pattern, names that this is the fourth time an exception has been pushed into a form/template field, rejects adding the requested compensation wording field to the long-term template baseline, and moves upstream to an offer wording confirmation node before template generation. It does allow a same-day temporary emergency field, but it is explicitly bounded and not treated as the default or structural fix, so the anti-spiral triage behavior is present rather than a direct next-field addition.
